dialogue_1: A: Hello! 👋 B: Hi! How are you? 😊 A: I am fine!
dialogue_2: A: What is your name? 🌟 B: My name is Lucas.
dialogue_3: A: How old are you? 🎈 B: I am ten years old.
dialogue_4: A: What color do you like? 🎨 B: I like blue 🔵
dialogue_5: A: Do you like pizza? 🍕 B: Yes, I do!
dialogue_6: A: What animal do you like? 🐯 B: I like lions!
dialogue_7: A: What time is it? ⏰ B: It is three o'clock.
dialogue_8: A: Good morning! ☀️ B: Good morning teacher!
dialogue_9: A: See you later 👋 B: Bye!
dialogue_10: A: Happy Birthday! 🎂 B: Thank you! 🎉
